test.note: 330 tests pass in ~13s. test_run_mutation_testing times out (>60s) but is filtered out.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When fixing blocking issues from a prior scrutiny review, ensure the fix commit includes the actual code changes to resolve the issue - not just test additions. The validation-lint-gate round 3 reviewer noted the worker 'only added unit tests but did NOT modify the broken LintGate JSON parsing code'. Ensure fix features include the actual bug fix, not just tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: validation-lint-gate was reviewed in rounds 2 and 3 with blocking issues but fixes were not applied until round 4 fix commit a28709a which included actual code changes

validation-lint-gate.originalIssue: JSON parsing broken - message is object not string
validation-lint-gate.verification: Code now correctly navigates nested paths: json.get('message').and_then(|m| m.get('message')), message.level, message.code.code, message.spans[0].file_name

val-predictive-selection.verification: Line 1578 now uses impact.lines_changed != 0 instead of !impact.lines_changed == 0

val-calibrated-confidence.verification: extract_features() now uses record.changed_files.len() and record.historical_defect_rate. predict() now uses &features.changed_files instead of empty slice

val-autonomous-coverage.originalIssue: files_analyzed hardcoded to 0, calculate_coverage_metrics hardcoded (0.75, 0.65, 0.80), run_static_coverage_analysis returned empty Vec
val-autonomous-coverage.verification: files_analyzed now computed from unique files in gaps. calculate_coverage_metrics runs cargo llvm-cov and parses JSON, returns (0.0, 0.0, 0.0) only when unavailable. run_static_coverage_analysis returns actual gaps from basic_static_analysis_static
